markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Align on content creation strategy and workflow for Guillaume Cabane's thought leadership using AI-assisted tools.](https://fathom.video/share/odC-eLh3NxRyYW6sG-JYc9-f1GtzXxoi?tab=summary&timestamp=5.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [GrowthX team to publish initial LinkedIn posts and longer-form content from existing material, focusing on strategic/thought leadership pieces](https://fathom.video/share/odC-eLh3NxRyYW6sG-JYc9-f1GtzXxoi?tab=summary&timestamp=326.0)
  - [Implement a 2x weekly posting cadence on LinkedIn to gauge audience reaction and refine the process](https://fathom.video/share/odC-eLh3NxRyYW6sG-JYc9-f1GtzXxoi?tab=summary&timestamp=493.0)
  - [Explore enhancing the content creation workflow with LLM-powered fact-checking and pre-writing question prompts](https://fathom.video/share/odC-eLh3NxRyYW6sG-JYc9-f1GtzXxoi?tab=summary&timestamp=1154.0)
  - [Fine-tune the balance between short-form (LinkedIn) and long-form content based on available input material and narrative coherence](https://fathom.video/share/odC-eLh3NxRyYW6sG-JYc9-f1GtzXxoi?tab=summary&timestamp=1479.0)

## Topics

### Content Creation Workflow and Tools

  - [Current workflow uses Atlas to generate LinkedIn posts from transcripts](https://fathom.video/share/odC-eLh3NxRyYW6sG-JYc9-f1GtzXxoi?tab=summary&timestamp=569.0)
  - [Customizable inputs include writing guidelines, user context (LinkedIn profile), and example posts](https://fathom.video/share/odC-eLh3NxRyYW6sG-JYc9-f1GtzXxoi?tab=summary&timestamp=592.0)
  - [Team exploring integration of fact-checking and pre-writing question prompts to improve output quality](https://fathom.video/share/odC-eLh3NxRyYW6sG-JYc9-f1GtzXxoi?tab=summary&timestamp=1194.0)

### Content Quality and Refinement

  - [Short-form content (LinkedIn posts) generally high-quality and ready for minor edits before publishing](https://fathom.video/share/odC-eLh3NxRyYW6sG-JYc9-f1GtzXxoi?tab=summary&timestamp=943.0)
  - [Longer-form content sometimes lacks coherent narrative structure; team to focus on improving story arcs](https://fathom.video/share/odC-eLh3NxRyYW6sG-JYc9-f1GtzXxoi?tab=summary&timestamp=1349.0)
  - [Technical content requires extra scrutiny to avoid incorrect statements that could damage credibility](https://fathom.video/share/odC-eLh3NxRyYW6sG-JYc9-f1GtzXxoi?tab=summary&timestamp=1103.0)

### Content Sources and Strategy

  - [Primary source: Podcast recordings (e.g., recent episode with Zapier CEO)](https://fathom.video/share/odC-eLh3NxRyYW6sG-JYc9-f1GtzXxoi?tab=summary&timestamp=1651.0)
  - [Focus on strategic and thought leadership pieces, which have worked well so far](https://fathom.video/share/odC-eLh3NxRyYW6sG-JYc9-f1GtzXxoi?tab=summary&timestamp=1393.0)
  - [Caution with tactical/technical pieces due to higher risk of errors and need for more detailed input](https://fathom.video/share/odC-eLh3NxRyYW6sG-JYc9-f1GtzXxoi?tab=summary&timestamp=1370.0)

### Posting Strategy and Feedback Loop

  - [Aim for 1-2 LinkedIn posts per week to start](https://fathom.video/share/odC-eLh3NxRyYW6sG-JYc9-f1GtzXxoi?tab=summary&timestamp=1526.0)
  - [Implement quick feedback loop: post content, gather reactions, refine approach](https://fathom.video/share/odC-eLh3NxRyYW6sG-JYc9-f1GtzXxoi?tab=summary&timestamp=1455.0)
  - [Balance between maintaining G's voice/style and increasing posting frequency](https://fathom.video/share/odC-eLh3NxRyYW6sG-JYc9-f1GtzXxoi?tab=summary&timestamp=1599.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Publish first piece and a couple of LinkedIn posts to gauge audience reaction](https://fathom.video/share/odC-eLh3NxRyYW6sG-JYc9-f1GtzXxoi?tab=summary&timestamp=1419.0)
  - [Megan and Jenn to experiment with LLM-powered question prompts for content creation](https://fathom.video/share/odC-eLh3NxRyYW6sG-JYc9-f1GtzXxoi?tab=summary&timestamp=1241.0)
  - [Dev team to integrate fact-checker into the content creation workflow](https://fathom.video/share/odC-eLh3NxRyYW6sG-JYc9-f1GtzXxoi?tab=summary&timestamp=1242.0)
  - [Giulia to continue adding new podcast recordings to the shared spreadsheet for content generation](https://fathom.video/share/odC-eLh3NxRyYW6sG-JYc9-f1GtzXxoi?tab=summary&timestamp=1644.0)
  - [Team to assess and iterate on the process based on market reaction to published content](https://fathom.video/share/odC-eLh3NxRyYW6sG-JYc9-f1GtzXxoi?tab=summary&timestamp=1419.0)
